# init(data:)

**Initializer**

Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a 16-, 32-, or 128-bit UUID data container.

## Declaration

```swift
init(data theData: Data)
```

## Parameters

- **theData**: Data containing a 16-, 32-, or 128-bit UUID.

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBUUID] object for the specified UUID data.

## Discussion

This method is useful when handling the UUID of a Bluetooth attribute in raw bytes.

## Creating New CBUUID Objects

- **init(string:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a 16-, 32-, or 128-bit UUID string.
- **init(cfuuid:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a Core Foundation UUID object.
- **init(nsuuid:)**: Creates a Core Bluetooth UUID object from a Foundation UUID object.
